title: 联机乐事 Together‘s Delight
description: 这个整合包丰富了mc的内容,增加了更多的群系，维度和武器。而且性能优异！This modpack ad new bioms and features to minecarft.
body:
中文：
概述 & 核心理念
联机乐事 是一个为 1.21.1 打造的大型、高性能的 Fabric 技术向整合包。 它汇集了超过 130个 精选模组，在保持原版风格与平衡的基础上，全面重塑了你的 Minecraft 体验——从视觉革命、深度探索、自动化建造到生存优化。

我们的目标不是简单堆砌模组，而是打造一个 “更好的 Minecraft”：一个更美丽、更丰富、更具挑战性且运行流畅的终极世界。

✨ 核心特性
巨量新内容：集成 我们走过的生物群体、Tectonic、天境 等，带来五十多个个新生物群系、维度、结构与生物。

完整的科技与冒险线：通过 Oritech、yung全家桶 等提供深度的物品管理与自动化体验。

极致性能优化：基于 Fabric 加载器，内置 Sodium、Lithium、ModernFix 等全套优化模组，确保在添加海量内容后依然流畅。

精心调校的兼容性：所有模组经过测试与配置，解决已知冲突，提供开箱即用的稳定体验。

强大的工具集：内置 Litematica、MiniHUD、JEI 等实用工具，助力建造与生存。

包含的主要模组类别
性能与优化：Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ModernFix, Krypton

世界生成：TerraBlender, 我们走过的生物群系, Tidal Towns , Sky Villages , YUNG全家桶

视觉与音频：Iris, 动态光源, 脚步声

生存与工具：精妙背包, 鞘翅插槽, 一键背包整理next

界面与品质：JEI, Xaero的小地图, 玉, 苹果皮

【独家特色】真实的渐进式装备锻造系统
厌倦了原版中“旧装备只能扔进熔炉”的浪费设定？我们引入了一个极其精妙且冷门的模组，彻底革新了装备升级的逻辑，让你的每一份努力都得到尊重：

平滑升级，物尽其用：不再需要凑齐三颗钻石来“无中生有”一把镐。现在，你可以在锻造台上，将一把铁镐 + 1颗钻石，合成为钻石镐。木质、石质工具和盔甲同理。这符合真实工匠“升级装备”的直觉，也让你的旧装备有了延续价值的喜悦。

更合理的生存曲线：这个改动极大优化了早期到中期的生存体验。当你挖到第一颗钻石时，不必再纠结是做成镐子还是护甲。你可以立即用它来升级你最重要的铁质工具，实现能力的平滑过渡，决策过程更有趣也更富策略性。
这就是我们理解的“更好的 Minecraft”——不仅更大、更美，而且更聪明、更合理。

系统要求（推荐）
内存：为整合包分配 4GB - 6GB 内存。

Java：务必安装 Java 21。

❓ 常见问题
Q：我可以添加自己的模组吗？

A：可以，但无法保证兼容性。建议备份世界，并逐一添加测试。

Q：游戏崩溃了怎么办？

A：请检查是否为整合包分配了足够内存，并确保已安装Java 21。完整的崩溃报告可在 .minecraft/logs 文件夹中找到。

Q：这个整合包支持光影吗？

A：是的！我们已预装Iris。你可以在视频设置中直接选择并应用光影包。

许可证与致谢
本整合包遵循 MIT协议。包内所有模组的版权归其原作者所有。

特别感谢所有模组开发者们的辛勤工作，特别感谢PurpurMC团队开发的PurpurPack系列模组。

English：
Overview & Core Philosophy
Together‘s Delight is a massive, high-performance Fabric-based technical modpack built for Minecraft 1.21.1. It brings together over 130 carefully curated mods that completely reinvent your Minecraft experience—from visual revolution and deep exploration to automation and survival optimization—while faithfully preserving the vanilla style and game balance.

Our goal is not to simply pile on mods, but to create a “Better Minecraft”: a more beautiful, richer, more challenging, and smoothly running ultimate world.

✨ Key Features
Massive New Content: Integrates mods like Biomes We’ve Gone, Tectonic, and The Aether to add dozens of new biomes, dimensions, structures, and creatures.

Complete Tech & Adventure Progression: Offers deep item management and automation experiences through Oritech, the complete suite of YUNG’s mods, and more.

Extreme Performance Optimization: Built on the Fabric loader and equipped with a full suite of optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, and ModernFix to ensure buttery smooth gameplay even with massive content added.

Meticulously Tuned Compatibility: Every mod has been tested and configured to resolve known conflicts, providing a stable, out-of-the-box experience.

Powerful Toolkit: Includes essential utilities like Litematica, MiniHUD, and JEI to empower your building and survival.

Primary Mod Categories Included
Performance & Optimization: Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ModernFix, Krypton

World Generation: TerraBlender, Biomes We've Gone, Tidal Towns, Sky Villages, YUNG's Suite (Better Strongholds, etc.)

Visuals & Audio: Iris, Dynamic Lights, Presence Footsteps

Survival & Utilities: Sophisticated Backpacks, Elytra Slot, Inventory Profiles Next

UI & Quality of Life: JEI, Xaero's Minimap, Jade, AppleSkin

[Exclusive Feature] Realistic Progressive Gear Forging System
Tired of the wasteful vanilla mechanic where old gear is only fit for the furnace? We’ve integrated an ingenious and lesser-known mod that completely overhauls equipment progression, ensuring your hard work is always respected:

Seamless Upgrades, Zero Waste: No more needing three diamonds to create a pickaxe “from nothing.” Now, at the Smithing Table, you can combine an Iron Pickaxe + 1 Diamond to forge a Diamond Pickaxe. The same logical upgrade path applies to wood/stone tools and armor. This fits a true craftsman’s intuition and brings joy to extending the life of your gear.

A More Rational Survival Curve: This change greatly optimizes the early to mid-game experience. When you mine your first diamond, you’re no longer forced to choose between a pickaxe or a piece of armor. You can immediately use it to upgrade your most critical iron tool, enabling a smooth power transition and more strategic, interesting decision-making.

System Requirements (Recommended)
RAM (Memory): Allocate 4GB - 6GB to the modpack.

Java: You MUST have Java 21 installed.

❓ Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
Q: Can I add my own mods to this pack?

A: Yes, but compatibility cannot be guaranteed. It is highly recommended to back up your world and test any added mods one at a time.

Q: What should I do if the game crashes?

A: First, verify that you have allocated sufficient RAM and have Java 21 installed. Complete crash reports can be found in the .minecraft/logs folder.

Q: Does this pack support shaders?

A: Yes! Iris Shaders is pre-installed. You can select and apply any shader pack directly from the video settings in-game.

License & Acknowledgments
This modpack is licensed under the MIT license. All mods included retain their respective copyrights held by their original authors.

A special thanks to all the dedicated mod developers. Extra gratitude to the PurpurMC team for their PurpurPack series of mods.
英文由deepseek R1翻译，非100%准确	English Translate by deepseek R1.
